title: Bridge Essay: Impact of short-term meditation and expectation on executive brain functions.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Impact, of, short-term, meditation, and.

**Impact of short-term meditation and expectation on executive brain functions.** — Behav Brain Res. PMID: 26462570. DOI: 10.1016/j.bbr.2015.10.012. Meditation improves executive functions such as attention and working memory processes. However, it remains unclear to what extent contextual effects contribute to these improvements, since the role of meditation-associated expectations has not been investigated so far.
